choice_value: OpenFOAM sampledSurface cutPlane with interpolated T and U on repaired major-span bin centers; connected regions are parsed and one region is selected per bin by aligned mass-flux support and reference-area agreement; matched bulk T is then computed from aligned positive mass-flux weighting.
minus d(area_avg(p_rgh))/ds so positive means pressure drop along local streamwise coordinate
Positive aligned mass flux follows the local streamwise coordinate as declared in the case profile; the current pipeline does not infer or validate flow direction automatically.
profile_dp_pa remains unsampled in the first feature-budget implementation
feature wall_dp_pa is inferred from adjacent major-span gradients
